place: Uluwatu, Pecatu, South Kuta, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Cliffside Four-Bedroom Sea-View Villa in Uluwatu
blurb: A one-of-one cliffside residence on the Uluwatu clifftops of Bali — 479 m² of glass-defined living over three levels, with a master suite suspended above the ocean, an infinity pool, a private cinema and a gym. Four en-suite bedrooms, each oriented to the horizon, to privacy and to flow, moments from the Bulgari Resort. Off-plan and fully furnished, on a 48-year lease, delivered within 12 months.
detail:
A PRIVATE CLIFFSIDE RESIDENCE IN ULUWATU
Set along the Uluwatu cliffs on Bali's southern peninsula, this is a one-of-one residence — developed as a singular asset rather than a repeatable product. Sheer glass elevations, dark stone and clean horizontal lines give the house a deliberate, gallery-like calm, while the cliff-edge setting draws the ocean and sky straight into the living spaces. Offered fully furnished, with delivery within 12 months. Moments from the Bulgari Resort, Uluwatu.

THE CLIFFSIDE RESIDENCE
479 m² of glass-defined living positioned along the Uluwatu cliffs, arranged over three levels and four en-suite bedrooms. A master suite is suspended above the ocean; an infinity pool, a private cinema and a fully equipped gym complete the home — each space oriented toward horizon, privacy and flow. Interiors are finished in a restrained palette of timber, black marble and soft plaster, with floor-to-ceiling glass, a floating staircase and marble-lined corridors connecting the floors.

Leisure is built into the plan rather than added as an afterthought. The dedicated cinema, a games room with its own bar and the fitness studio occupy the lower level, while the garden level opens to the infinity pool, sun terraces and lawn shaded by mature frangipani — resort-style living at home, for entertaining, wellness and long, unhurried days.

The 479 m² of interior sits on a 500 m² clifftop plot within one of Bali's most sought-after and fast-evolving addresses, minutes from Uluwatu's cliff beaches, surf breaks and dining. Offered on a 48-year leasehold. We can share the full floor plans, specification and payment schedule on request.
